note: Fly.io cost facts. Dedicated IPv4 addresses are billed per app per month; outbound transfer is billed per GB (North America/Europe; higher elsewhere), ingress free. Persistent volumes bill hourly even when machines are stopped (volume per-GB rate not included here — declare it before quantifying detached volumes). Cross-check the source before any billing decision.

sources.what: Dedicated IPv4 $2/mo per app; outbound $0.02/GB (NA/EU); volumes billed hourly
